description: Manual metadata merged into generated cidy_knowledge_inventory.json. Use this for owner units, curated labels, management notes, and manager updates that should survive regeneration.

domainOverrides.label: Peace and Development Trust Fund / UNPDF

folderOverrides.description: Text-only Word documents describing Cidy, the knowledge topics it covers, examples of questions users can ask, and the Copilot Studio architecture and flow behind inquiry capture, classification, clarification, question enhancement, routing, response generation, confidence assessment, feedback, and escalation.
